heading: Rules and regulations
label: 178l Rules and regulations
text: The Secretaries may issue rules and regulations necessary to effectuate the purposes of this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1984— substituted “The Secretaries” for “The Secretary of Agriculture and the Secretary of Commerce”.Pub. L. 98–284
amendments: Amendments1984— substituted “The Secretaries” for “The Secretary of Agriculture and the Secretary of Commerce”.Pub. L. 98–284
